name: eviagent-jbi-artifacts
description: Data, code, and reproducibility artifacts for the EviAgent Evidence Decision Loop JBI manuscript.

scripts.run:main: node src/scripts/run_live_comparison_v4.js --dataset data/canonical_main_390.jsonl --out-dir results/reproduction-smoke --sample-per-source 1 --methods direct,cot,react,edl --setting frozen-evidence --check
